attacking_style: Launches strong solo moves over final climb crests, attempting to establish gaps before organized chase begins. Attacks at high tempo (25km/h on climbs) without waiting for group fracturing.
team_tactics: Operates without adequate support riders; goes solo without domestique positioning or team tempo control to soften opposition beforehand.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes and technical descents following climbs where solo strength can create separation. Struggles on flat run-ins where organized teams can chase efficiently.
vulnerability: Exposed when organized teams coordinate pursuit after solo moves; lacks team support to sustain or defend advantages in final circuits or flat approaches to finish.
key_patterns: Attacks over climb summits rather than mid-ascent, timing moves for descent advantage.
Solo efforts without team support structure, relying purely on individual strength.
Gets absorbed before finish when organized teams deploy chase tactics systematically.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows strong climbing legs and tactical ambition, but insufficient data to assess progression
